markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content cadence, performance, and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Cadence Shift:** Article reviews will now occur on Thursdays/Fridays, shifting publishing to Tuesdays/Wednesdays to align with Rimkus's internal schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Strategic Pause:** Forensic construction topics will be paused after this week due to internal messaging confusion between two distinct practice areas.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [**New Content Initiatives:** GrowthX will investigate two new content streams: repurposing a book into a "mini-cluster" and increasing weekly article volume from 5 to 7.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [**ROI Validation:** GrowthX will research methods to exclude internal traffic from performance reports, providing a clearer view of external ROI for C-suite validation.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

## Topics

### Content Cadence & Workflow

  - [**Problem:** Rimkus's internal review schedule (Thursdays/Fridays) conflicts with the current publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift publishing to Tuesdays/Wednesdays to create a more predictable workflow. This change will be phased in, with a firm schedule set in the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Communication:** Nohora D. still lacks access to the GrowthX Slack workspace. Alishia Natiello will assist in resolving the issue, which is likely a conflict with Rimkus's own Slack domain.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Performance is strong and has rebounded from the Thanksgiving dip.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**New Report View:** The performance report now cohorts data by forensic cluster, enabling quarterly analysis of what content resonates and where to focus future efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**ROI Validation:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Problem:** Internal traffic from Rimkus stakeholders inflates performance metrics, obscuring true external ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Need:** A method to exclude internal traffic to provide a clear, defensible ROI narrative for the C-suite.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew Alves-Hill will research potential solutions and report back.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [**Increased Article Volume:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [**Request (Vitaly):** Increase weekly articles from 5 to 7 (2 BES, 2 Forensics, 1 Life Sciences, 2 Refresh).](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew Alves-Hill will assess feasibility, noting that 5 articles is the typical sweet spot for maintaining editorial quality.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [**Book Repurposing:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Repurpose content from a new book by a Rimkus expert on trucking defense.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**Two Paths:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
        1.  [**Knowledge Base:** Use the book PDF as a source artifact for standard articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
        2.  [**Mini-Cluster:** Create a dedicated content cluster from the book's insights.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
      - [**Action:** Matthew Alves-Hill will research the feasibility and scope of the mini-cluster option.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

### Strategic Pause: Forensic Construction Content

  - [**Problem:** Internal confusion exists between two distinct construction practice areas (Rod Renneson's vs. TJ Cate's groups), making it difficult to create clear content.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pause new forensic construction topics after this week's batch.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [**Next Focus:** Shift to other forensic clusters, starting with Transportation and Property, while Rimkus leadership clarifies internal messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

### Holiday Schedule

  - [**Syncs:** No syncs on Dec 24 or Dec 31.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Content:** Final articles for review will be submitted on Dec 19.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Publishing:** GrowthX can publish approved articles over the holidays if notified via Slack. Otherwise, publishing resumes Jan 2.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Alishia Natiello:** Help Nohora D. resolve the Slack access issue.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Jennifer Bulmash:** Provide the book PDF to GrowthX for the knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**Matthew Alves-Hill:**](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [Research methods to exclude internal traffic from performance reports.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [Assess the feasibility of increasing weekly articles to 7.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [Research the scope and feasibility of creating a "mini-cluster" from the book.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
      - [Shift new forensic topics to Transportation and Property after this week.](https://fathom.video/share/kzukZry8hh8uyftMGa96XhstARqAKo3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
